name: BB:UBA : Unusual Source Locations
notes: A match indicates that an event is sourced from a country that you would not expect under normal circumstances.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Unusual Source Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the source is located in misc.SatelliteProvider, misc.AnonymousProxy, Antarctic.Antarctica
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Unusual Source Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source is located in misc.SatelliteProvider,   misc.AnonymousProxy,   Antarctic.Antarctica
